title: TIMS Sanathnagar Sees 97 Patients on Trial Run
description: On the directions of health minister Damodar Rajanarsimha, the health department set up the trial run which covers 22 departments, including cardiology, neurology, nephrology, gastroenterology, urology, general medicine and general surgery. Officials have deployed the required number of doctors and paramedical staff to ensure smooth functioning of services during the trial phase.
